title: Sakaler Sure
desc: Bengali artists love devotional and folk songs. These songs inspire singers and audiences alike. They celebrate culture and faith, creating a shared experience.

title: Shapath Nilam
desc: Sukanta is shattered when his wife, Minu. Though his wife fails to recognise him after the incident, her twin sister, Debu, tries to find the culprit.

title: Mangal Deep
desc: Deep and Mangal chase music dreams in Kolkata, face hurdles, gain support from Ramu Da and Chandra's connections, overcome misunderstandings, and finally reunite.

desc: Simul, Rajani's son, falls in love with Parul. However, Parul's father refuses to accept their relationship as he has a complicated past with Rajani.

title: Deya Neya
desc: Prasanta aspires to be a singer but his father disapproves. However, he decides to leave for Calcutta to become a singer and falls for Sucharita.

title: Boss 2
desc: Surya seeks revenge in Bangkok against the goons who stole the people's money from his bank.

title: Amar Tumi
desc: Jhilik, a girl from an affluent home, falls in love with the middle-class Subhra. When her father opposes their relationship, they elope.

desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!
